failure_routing.failure: revocation smoke could race with live frames captured before the control transition
failure_routing.resolution: wait for revoked state then assert the frame counter remains stable across a later status interval; exact final-zero count remains unit-tested

failure_routing.failure: first PR16 local session attempt used an older PR13 host binary and status lacked mediaAvailability
failure_routing.resolution: rebuilt the host from the current checkout; full smoke passed; clean CI builds before running the session gate

failure_routing.failure: Windows SIGINT teardown and portable logs-follow exposed platform-specific process and log lifecycle gaps
failure_routing.resolution: closed the portable logs and Quickstart teardown paths without weakening the matrix

failure_routing.failure: npm install normalized cli/bin/weaver.js to a non-executable mode in a clean checkout
the retained Metal texture was correct but the real CAMetalDrawable was only cleared because the presenter pipeline and sampler were not initialized
failure_routing.resolution: initialize the presenter before the compositor and assert the exact drawable sample

failure_routing.failure: desktop-icon-minus-one flattened a premultiplied transparent desktop window against white
failure_routing.resolution: use wallpaper-plus-one, keep the widget below Finder desktop items, and propagate premultiplied alpha to the CAMetalLayer

failure_routing.failure: the standalone macOS WebView example omitted the embedded production metallib and failed to link
failure_routing.resolution: link the same build-time metallib symbols as generated applications

unverified_physical: external displays on every side and reconnect
Stage Manager, Space switching, fullscreen, lock and unlock
real System Audio Recording revocation, protected-stream policy, physical route loss and recovery, and sustained callback cost
Developer ID signing, notarization, App Sandbox, universal packaging, and login item
